overall.description: First-person gameplay footage depicting a character walking through a forest at night, carrying a wooden pole. The player moves from a logging area with stacked timber toward a campsite featuring a log cabin and campfire, ending with the discovery of a figure standing near the cabin.

moving from dirt path into tall grass approaching the campsite

dense pine trees silhouetted against the night sky with stars visible

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark forest at night, with the player walking past substantial stacks of cut logs. The camera moves steadily forward along a dirt trail, transitioning into an area with taller grass as a wooden cabin becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy approach to wooden cabin campsite

events.description: warm glow of campfire becomes visible ahead, illuminating the cabin
entering the fenced campsite area with canvas structures

agents.ego_description: approaching the campsite guided by firelight, moving toward the burning campfire

entered.detail: small wooden log cabin with sloped roof and chimney
burning fire with visible flames and smoke rising into the night air
makeshift tent constructed from canvas or animal hide supported by wooden poles
rough wooden post and rail fence enclosing the campsite

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a campsite through tall grass, with a log cabin and burning campfire becoming visible ahead. A canvas shelter stands to the left while a wooden fence lines the right side. The campfire's glow grows stronger as the player enters the enclosed campsite area.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite clearing with central fire pit

events.description: player circles around the campfire, changing direction relative to the fire
human figure appears standing near the cabin entrance

agents.ego_description: circling the campfire and moving toward a figure standing motionless near the cabin

notable_agents.action: standing motionless near the cabin entrance facing the player

entered.detail: tree stump used as chopping block with axe embedded or items placed on top
wooden supply crate or box near the fence line

segments.scene_description: The player circles around the central campfire, passing a chopping block and wooden crate. As the camera moves past the fire toward the cabin, a figure becomes visible standing near the cabin entrance. The wooden fence now appears on the left as the perspective shifts around the campsite.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest that transitions from a desolate logging area into the warm, eerie glow of a remote campsite. It begins by moving steadily along a dirt trail past substantial stacks of cut logs, gradually shifting into an area of tall grass as a wooden cabin emerges in the distance. As the camera approaches the campsite, the scene opens up to reveal a canvas shelter and a wooden fence, with the flickering light of a burning campfire growing stronger. The perspective then circles around the central fire, passing a chopping block and wooden crate before turning toward the cabin entrance. Finally, the movement reveals a mysterious figure standing still near the cabin as the wooden fence shifts to the left of the frame.
